pr.title: Non-record submission: Depth Recurrence + Legal Score-First TTT (10L, 1.1532 BPB)

output.summary: Mixed int5/int6 quantized 10-layer GPT uses chunked score-first full-model TTT to maintain persistent adaptation across validation chunks.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Runs competition-legal full-model test-time training that trains on already-scored validation chunks.
techniques: Chunked score-first full-model TTT with cosine LR decay
Persistent adaptation across sliding-window validation chunks
Mixed int5/int6 quantization with Late QAT and GPTQ-lite
